rules: Current allowed work is profile setup only unless the master gate advances.
Run check commands before write commands, then refresh daily ops after real writeback.
Profile proof must be real external evidence: screenshot, clicked public link, or timestamped platform proof.
Publishing opens only after active profile rows are configured; KPI, Luna, affiliate, and paid offer experiments remain blocked until public post evidence exists.
Do not use empty KPI or lead data to choose winning guardians or commercial direction.

nowActions.label: YouTube Shorts
nowActions.copy: LoveTypes Heart-Language Garden | Take the 15-question quiz to find your emotional guardian.
nowActions.stopCondition: Stop if account/profile is not visibly LoveTypes, edit permission is missing, /start/ UTM is changed, or Bio copy adds paid/diagnosis claims.

nextActions.title: First YouTube Shorts post
nextActions.stopCondition: Do not publish until all active profile links are set/live and proof is written back.

nextActions.title: First-batch minimum KPI backfill
nextActions.stopCondition: Do not write KPI values until public post URLs and analytics source proof exist.

nextActions.title: Lead, asset, Luna, and offer decisions
nextActions.stopCondition: Do not create paid or priority offer experiments without repeated traceable demand.
